languages.text: "Мы служим госпоже Элане, Лорд-капитан. Она добралась до дворца?"
"We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"
languages.original_text: "Мы служим госпоже Элане, Лорд-капитан. Она добралась до дворца?"

traits.locale_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"
"We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"
"We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

languages.text: “我们效忠于埃拉娜女士，舰长大人。她可抵达了宫殿？”
languages.original_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

traits.locale_text: “我们效忠于埃拉娜女士，舰长大人。她可抵达了宫殿？”

languages.text: « Nous servons maîtresse Elana, seigneur-capitaine. A-t-elle réussi à atteindre le palais ? »
languages.original_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

traits.locale_text: « Nous servons maîtresse Elana, seigneur-capitaine. A-t-elle réussi à atteindre le palais ? »

languages.text: "Biz Elana Hanım'a hizmet ediyoruz Lord Kaptan. Kendisi saraya ulaştı mı?"
languages.original_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

traits.locale_text: "Biz Elana Hanım'a hizmet ediyoruz Lord Kaptan. Kendisi saraya ulaştı mı?"

languages.text: «Servimos a la señora Elana, Lord Capitán. ¿Ha llegado ya al palacio?».
languages.original_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

traits.locale_text: «Servimos a la señora Elana, Lord Capitán. ¿Ha llegado ya al palacio?».

languages.text: "Wir dienen Meisterin Elana, Lord Captain. Ist sie bereits im Palast eingetroffen?"
languages.original_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

traits.locale_text: "Wir dienen Meisterin Elana, Lord Captain. Ist sie bereits im Palast eingetroffen?"

languages.text: 「我々はエレナ女主人に仕える。船長様、彼女は宮殿にたどり着いたか？」
languages.original_text: "We serve Mistress Elana, Lord Captain. Has she reached the palace?"

traits.locale_text: 「我々はエレナ女主人に仕える。船長様、彼女は宮殿にたどり着いたか？」
